Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
The first-ever 3x levered bitcoin funds are launching in Europe next week. The timing couldn't be worse.

overview.description: The 2x Bitcoin Strategy ETF (BITX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund aims to provide 2x the daily price movements of an index based on rolling front-month CME bitcoin futures. BITX was launched on Jun 27, 2023 and is issued by Volatility Shares.

data.title: Bitcoin's high conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
data.text: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin. Of the bitcoin sold in the past 30 days, 26% came from investors who bought it above $90,000.

data.title: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
data.text: Bitcoin gained 12.7% in April, registering back-to-back monthly gains and its best month since April 2025. The run was driven by leveraged trading activity in the derivatives market while demand for t...

data.title: The first-ever 3x levered bitcoin funds are launching in Europe next week. The timing couldn't be worse.
data.text: Leveraged ETFs bring even more risk to volatile assets like crypto.

data.title: What Baron Capital's newest ETFs say about interest in active investing
data.text: Dave Nadig, Nadig.com independent ETF expert, joins CNBC's Frank Holland on ‘Halftime Report' to discuss Baron Capital's entrance into the ETF market and why going active could work for the firm.
